ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read, update, and delete all policies for privileged role assignments of your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read, update, and delete policies for privileged role-based access control (RBAC) assignments of your company's directory, without a signed-in user.
Read, update, and delete all policies for privileged role assignments of your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph
